## Problem

What user or operator problem are you trying to solve?

## Proposed Change

Describe the behavior or workflow you want.

## Why It Matters

Explain the impact on users, maintainers, or runtime behavior.

## Constraints Or Risks

Call out any compatibility, migration, or UX concerns.

## Additional Context

Links, sketches, examples, or prior discussion.
